rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for bindings.
Use valid AADL component type and implementation scopes for annex placement.
generic_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic.
Write AGREE contracts inside annex agree {** ... **} blocks with proper logical operators.
Relate visible outputs to visible inputs in type-level guarantees, avoiding implementation-only paths.
Ensure AGREE scalar types match AADL expectations: int, real, bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **} blocks.
Use const, eq, and gua keywords for declarations in AGREE.
Avoid using AADL property names directly as AGREE variables.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and timing parameters
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
